mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_mcp_alert_event ( id, server_id, server_slug, tool_name, alert_type, severity, status, summary, details_json, resolved_at, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( CAST(#{id} AS uuid), CAST(#{serverId} AS uuid), #{serverSlug}, #{toolName}, #{alertType}, #{severity}, #{status}, #{summary}, #{detailsJson}, #{resolvedAt}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt} )
mapper.update: UPDATE t_mcp_alert_event SET server_id = CAST(#{serverId} AS uuid), server_slug = #{serverSlug}, tool_name = #{toolName}, alert_type = #{alertType}, severity = #{severity}, status = #{status}, summary = #{summary}, details_json = #{detailsJson}, resolved_at = #{resolvedAt}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} WHERE id = CAST(#{id} AS uuid)
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM t_mcp_alert_event WHERE server_id = CAST(#{serverId} AS uuid) AND alert_type = #{alertType} AND status = 'OPEN' ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT * FROM t_mcp_alert_event WHERE status = 'OPEN' ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT #{limit}
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM t_mcp_alert_event WHERE status = 'OPEN'
mapper.update: UPDATE t_mcp_alert_event SET status = 'RESOLVED', resolved_at = #{resolvedAt}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} WHERE server_id = CAST(#{serverId} AS uuid) AND alert_type = #{alertType} AND status = 'OPEN'
